title: aonova Fruit Fly Traps, Pack 30 Yellow Double-sided Fungus Gnat Sticky Catcher for Plants Indoor and Outdoor Insects Fly Control - Non-Toxic, Waterproof
bullet_points: EFFECTIVE AND ECONOMICAL PEST CONTROL - Our effective fruit fly traps are specially designed to catch a wide range of flying pests, including fungus gnats, fruit flies, whiteflies, winged aphids, thrips, mining flies, and mourning flies. Keep your plants and surroundings hassle-free from these annoying creatures.

ODORLESS AND SAFE - Our effective fruit fly traps are made from non-toxic materials, ensuring they are safe to use around children and pets. Plus, they are odorless, so you won't have to worry about any unpleasant smells filling up your living spaces.

HASSLE-FREE APPLICATION - Using the traps is incredibly easy. Just peel off the white protective paper and place them into the potting soil of your plants. Another option is to lay the trap flat with the sticky side facing up, after removing the paper from only one side. Even if you water the plants and accidentally pour water on it, the adhesive will still work effectively.

WIDE RANGE of APPLICABLE SCENARIOS - Ideal for use in greenhouses, indoor settings, orchards, small farms, nurseries and gardens to protect plants from flying insects, including flowers, vegetables, houseplants as well as outdoor plants. However, caution should be exercised when using this product outdoors, as it may harm beneficial insects such as bees, geckos, and spiders.

WE VALUE YOUR SATISFACTION - If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us via email. Our dedicated customer service team will promptly respond to your inquiries and provide you with a satisfactory solution.
